top_signals.title: Former Obama Diplomat: US-Iran Deal Favors Tehran
top_signals.summary: Former US Deputy National Security Adviser Mara Rudman says the Iran deal as “uneven,” saying that it does not prevent Tehran from continuing its nuclear enrichment activities. She says the agreement requires a robust inspection mechanism—something unlikely to be secured within the 60-day negotiation window. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
